title: Compensation; expenses
doc_html:
§3087.215.  Compensation; expenses

The membership of said commission shall serve without compensation for its services to the commission, but it shall be entitled to reimbursement for actual expenses incurred in the performance of its duties.

Acts 2003, No. 233, §1.
